welcome.title: {appName}
welcome.description: Astro, React, and TypeScript are ready for the team to start building product screens.

rule.title: How to Play Chula QR Quest

step1.title: Get Your Passport
step1.text: Use the Passport included in your new student handbook

step2.title: View the Map
step2.text: Open the map to see the locations of all stamp collection points

step3.title: Explore
step3.text: Walk to each location. When you arrive, you'll find a stamp for your Passport

step4.title: Collect Them All
step4.text: Collect stamps from every designated point

step5.title: Redeem Your Reward
step5.text: Bring your completed Passport to redeem your reward at the specified date, time, and location

home.title: Walk Rally
home.cancelMessage: Do you want to cancel {name}, Round {index}?
home.cancelFailMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.

events.title: Activities
events.minigameSummary:
Join in with 1 of 6 board games 
and make new friends through every game.
events.roundsNote: Please select a time slot. Some rounds may be unavailable due to conditions.
events.conflictMessage: You can't book this time slot because it conflicts with another activity you've already selected.
events.roundLockedMessage: You can't select this round because you've already registered for another round of this activity.
events.confirmMessage: Do you want to add {name}, Round {index}?
events.failMessage: Invalid student ID, or you are not registered in the system.
